lines.english: Salok:
So many times, Nanak is a sacrifice to Him. ||8||18||
Having created the creation, He infuses His own power into it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਮਾਵਨਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਇਹੁ ਧਨੁ ਸਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har har naam kamaavanaa naanak ihu dhan saar |1|
lines.english: Practice the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. O Nanak, this is the most excellent wealth. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਥਿ ਨ ਚਾਲੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਭਜਨ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਸਗਲੀ ਛਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: saath na chaalai bin bhajan bikhiaa sagalee chhaar |
lines.english: Nothing shall go along with you, except your devotion. All corruption is like ashes.
Joining the Company of the Saints, practice deep meditation.
Remember the One, and take the Support of the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
Forget all other efforts, O my friend
Ashtapadee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਰਿਦ ਮਹਿ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal rid meh ur dhaarahu |
lines.english: - enshrine the Lord's Lotus Feet within your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦ੍ਰਿੜੁ ਕਰਿ ਗਹਹੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਵਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: drirr kar gahahu naam har vath |
lines.english: Grasp firmly the object of the Lord's Name.
God is All-powerful; He is the Cause of causes.
Pure are the instructions of the humble Saints.
Gather this wealth, and become very fortunate.
Keep faith in the One Lord within your mind.
All disease, O Nanak, shall then be dispelled. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਧਨ ਕਉ ਚਾਰਿ ਕੁੰਟ ਉਠਿ ਧਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jis dhan kau chaar kuntt utth dhaaveh |
lines.english: The wealth which you chase after in the four directions

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਧਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਤੇ ਪਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: so dhan har sevaa te paaveh |
lines.english: you shall obtain that wealth by serving the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਸੋਭਾ ਕਉ ਕਰਹਿ ਭਲੀ ਕਰਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: jis sobhaa kau kareh bhalee karanee |
lines.english: The glory, for which you perform good deeds
that peace comes by the love of the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾ ਸੋਭਾ ਭਜੁ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਸਰਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: saa sobhaa bhaj har kee saranee |
lines.english: - you shall obtain that glory by seeking the Lord's Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਸੁਖ ਕਉ ਨਿਤ ਬਾਛਹਿ ਮੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: jis sukh kau nit baachheh meet |
lines.english: The peace, which you always yearn for, O friend
All sorts of remedies have not cured the disease
- the disease is cured only by giving the medicine of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਮਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: sarab nidhaan meh har naam nidhaan |
lines.english: Of all treasures, the Lord's Name is the supreme treasure.
Having wandered around in the ten directions, it comes to its place of rest.
Chant it, O Nanak, and be accepted in the Court of the Lord. ||2||
Enlighten your mind with the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਰਿਦੈ ਬਸੈ ਹਰਿ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai ridai basai har soe |
lines.english: whose heart is filled with the Lord.
The Dark Age of Kali Yuga is so hot; the Lord's Name is soothing and cool.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕਉ ਬਿਘਨੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: taa kau bighan na laagai koe |
lines.english: No obstacle stands in the way of one
Remember, remember it in meditation, and obtain everlasting peace.
Your fear shall be dispelled, and your hopes shall be fulfilled.
You shall go to that home, and live forever.
By devotional worship and loving adoration, your soul shall be enlightened.
One who contemplates the essence of reality, is said to be the true person.
Birth and death are the lot of the false and the insincere.
Says Nanak, the noose of death is cut away. ||3||
Coming and going in reincarnation is ended by serving God.
Give up your selfishness and conceit, and seek the Sanctuary of the Divine Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਉ ਰਤਨ ਜਨਮ ਕਾ ਹੋਇ ਉਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: eiau ratan janam kaa hoe udhaar |
lines.english: Thus the jewel of this human life is saved.
not by studying the Simritees, the Shaastras or the Vedas.
Remember the Lord, Har, Har, the Support of the breath of life.
By all sorts of efforts, people are not saved

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har kee bhagat karahu man laae |
lines.english: Worship the Lord with whole-hearted devotion.
why do you cling to it, you fool?
O Nanak, you shall obtain the fruits of your mind's desire. ||4||
Your wealth shall not go with you;
Power, pleasure, and the vast expanse of Maya
Children, friends, family and spouse

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਨ ਤੇ ਕਹਹੁ ਤੁਮ ਕਵਨ ਸਨਾਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: ein te kahahu tum kavan sanaathaa |
lines.english: who of these shall accompany you?
Horses, elephants, chariots and pageantry

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਦੀਏ ਤਿਸੁ ਬੁਝੈ ਨ ਬਿਗਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jin dee tis bujhai na bigaanaa |
lines.english: The fool does not acknowledge the One who gave this;
- false shows and false displays.
who has ever escaped from these?
forgetting the Naam, O Nanak, he will repent in the end. ||5||
without devotion, even the clever have drowned.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਮਤਿ ਤੂੰ ਲੇਹਿ ਇਆਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee mat toon lehi eaane |
lines.english: Take the Guru's advice, you ignorant fool;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਹੁ ਮਨ ਮੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: har kee bhagat karahu man meet |
lines.english: Worship the Lord with heart-felt devotion, my friend;
Enshrine the Lord's Lotus Feet in your mind;
your consciousness shall become pure.
